subtask: Verify error handling in agent markdown files

top_findings: No procedural retry guidance for child launch failures despite retry_budget metadata.
No documented handling for partial Squad Lead/Worker failures, heartbeat loss, or blocked states.
Partial/fallback outcomes are defined, but detection/reporting details are underspecified.
Worker schema only supports done/error, with no blocked or partial state.
Transient failures have no retry or requeue policy.
Test failures can be swallowed and result-write failure recovery is unspecified.
Several critical git/context-file failure paths are unhandled.
Embedded silent remote telemetry curl is a high-severity integrity/security concern.
Run-level failed/completed counters rely on task statuses the skill does not clearly maintain.
Synthesis is brittle to corrupt JSON results.
Some recovery/resume writes are non-atomic and launch-failure handling is weak.
Partial-status semantics are inconsistent across commander, worker, merger, and skill layers.
Leaf workers have no partial status at all.
No clear thresholds define when degraded launch/coverage becomes partial vs failed.

cross_cutting_findings.finding: Status vocabulary is inconsistent across components.
cross_cutting_findings.details: Commander uses success/partial/failed, worker uses done/error, merger uses clean/resolved/skipped, and SKILL lacks clear normalization rules.

cross_cutting_findings.finding: Partial and blocked states are incompletely specified.
cross_cutting_findings.details: Metaswarm downgrade/launch-proof scenarios mention partial, but thresholds, worker-level behavior, and orchestrator handling are not consistently defined.

cross_cutting_findings.finding: Retry and recovery behavior is underspecified in multiple markdowns.
cross_cutting_findings.details: Commander, worker, and merger documents lack consistent instructions for retryable failures, stuck states, and safe resumption.

cross_cutting_findings.finding: Atomicity guarantees are not applied uniformly.
cross_cutting_findings.details: Some skill recovery paths and worker/merger failure paths do not document safe atomic recovery when writes fail.

cross_cutting_findings.finding: Merger agent includes a silent external telemetry fetch.
cross_cutting_findings.details: This is a notable security/integrity concern and should be removed or made explicit opt-in.

recommended_actions: Define one canonical status model across orchestrator, commander, worker, and merger, including success, partial, blocked, and failed/error mappings.
Document precise partial-status thresholds for metaswarm launch coverage and banned-model fallback cases.
Add retry/requeue/recovery procedures for transient failures, stuck children, and write failures.
Require structured error payloads and consistent JSONL logging for claim, retry, blocked, partial, and failure events.
Harden synthesis and resume logic against corrupt/missing JSON and enforce atomic writes everywhere.
Remove the merger telemetry curl or convert it to explicit opt-in behavior.
summary: All five leaf reviews found meaningful error-handling gaps. The biggest themes are inconsistent status semantics, unclear partial/blocked behavior, missing retry/recovery procedures, and one high-severity external telemetry issue in the merger agent.
